question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: How many male clients in 'Hl.m. Praha' district?  District data appears in the A2; Male means that gender = 'M'
orig_masked: How many [C12] [T3] in '[V1]' [T5]?  [T5] data appears in the [C24]; [C12] means that [C12] = '[V2]'; [V1] is a value of the column [C24]; [V2] is a value of the column [C12]
orig_evidence: District data appears in the A2; Male means that gender = 'M'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.client_id) FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.gender = 'M' AND T2.A2 = 'Hl.m. Praha'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: What's the long name for the team GEN? long name for the team refers to team_long_name; team_short_name = 'GEN';
orig_masked: What's the [C173] for the [T6] [V1]? [C173] for the [T6] refers to [C173]; [C174] = '[V1]';; [V1] is a value of the column [C174]
orig_evidence: long name for the team refers to team_long_name; team_short_name = 'GEN';
orig_gold_sql: SELECT team_long_name FROM Team WHERE team_short_name = 'GEN'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: For the patient whose birthday was 1959/3/1, what symptoms did he/she have during the examination on 1993/9/27?
orig_masked: For the [T3] whose [C59] was [V2], what [C12] did he/she have during the [T1] on [V1]? ; [V1] is a value of the column [C7]; [V2] is a value of the column [C59]
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T2.Symptoms FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.Birthday = '1959-03-01' AND T2.`Examination Date` = '1993-09-27'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: List all the clients' IDs whose junior credit cards were issued after 1996. After 1996 means date > = '1997-01-01
orig_masked: List all the [C14] whose [V2] [T2] were [C7] [C7]. [C7] means [C7] > = '[V1]; [V1] is a value of the column [C7]; [V2] is a value of the column [C8]
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T2.client_id FROM card AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.disp_id = T2.disp_id WHERE T1.type = 'junior' AND T1.issued >= '1997-01-01'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Find the average weight of the heroes who are aliens.  average = AVG(weight_kg); aliens refers to race = 'Alien';
orig_masked: Find the average [C29] of the [T9] who are [C17].  average = AVG([C29]); [C17] refers to [C17] = '[V1]';; [V1] is a value of the column [C17]
orig_evidence: average = AVG(weight_kg); aliens refers to race = 'Alien';
orig_gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(T1.weight_kg) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.race_id = T2.id WHERE T2.race = 'Alien'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: For the first client who opened his/her account in Prague, what is his/her account ID? A3 stands for region names
orig_masked: For the first [T1] who [T1] his/her [T1] in [V1], what is his/her [C1]? [C25] stands for [C25]; [V1] is a value of the column [C25]
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T1.account_id FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T2.A3 = 'Prague' ORDER BY T1.date ASC LIMIT 1

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: How many customers who choose statement of weekly issuance are Owner?  'POPLATEK TYDNE' stands for weekly issuance
orig_masked: How many [T1] who choose [C4] are [V2]?  '[V1]' stands for [C4]; [V1] is a value of the column [C4]; [V2] is a value of the column [C16]
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.account_id) FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T2.type = 'OWNER' AND T1.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: State the name of players who came from Belgium. name of players refers to player_name; Belgium is name of country
orig_masked: State the [C126] who came from [V1]. [C126] refers to [C126]; [V1] is [C2]; [V1] is a value of the column [C2]
orig_evidence: name of players refers to player_name; Belgium is name of country
orig_gold_sql: SELECT t3.player_name FROM Country AS t1 INNER JOIN Match AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.country_id INNER JOIN Player AS t3 ON t2.home_player_1 = t3.player_api_id WHERE t1.name = 'Belgium'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: How many credit card withdrawals were recorded after 1995? Operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' means credit card withdrawals
orig_masked: How many [C53] were recorded after [V2]? [C53] = '[V1]' means [C53]; [V1] is a value of the column [C53]; [V2] is a value of the column [C51]
orig_evidence: Operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' means credit card withdrawals
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(account_id) FROM trans WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', date) > '1995' AND operation = 'VYBER KARTOU'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: List the full names of superheroes with missing weight. missing weight refers to weight_kg = 0 OR weight_kg = NULL;
orig_masked: List the [C20] of [T9] with missing [C29]. missing [C29] refers to [C29] = [V1] OR [C29] = NULL;; [V1] is a value of the column [C29]
orig_evidence: missing weight refers to weight_kg = 0 OR weight_kg = NULL;
orig_gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT full_name FROM superhero WHERE full_name IS NOT NULL AND (weight_kg IS NULL OR weight_kg = 0)
